title: anacamptis × cortesii
intro: Anacamptis × cortesii, also known as the Cortes' Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that combines the characteristics of Anacamptis morio and Orchis corsica. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anacamptis × cortesii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
